TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.subtitle: Final-Session 1
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.description: Coverage from the final on the seventh day of the tournament, which takes place in Yushan, China. Scotland's John Higgins won his fifth World Open title last year after he defeated England's Joe O'Connor 10-6 in the final. His fifth triumph came 21 years after his first success in 1994 and was the first time he'd won the event since 2008. It meant that O'Connor had lost his second ranking final in a row after defeat by Gary Wilson in the 2022 Scottish Open.

TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.title: Live: Snooker World Open
TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.subtitle: Final-Session 2
TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.description: Further coverage from the final on the seventh day of the tournament, which takes place in Yushan, China. Scotland's John Higgins won his fifth World Open title last year after he defeated England's Joe O'Connor 10-6 in the final. His fifth triumph came 21 years after his first success in 1994 and was the first time he'd won the event since 2008. It meant that O'Connor had lost his second ranking final in a row after defeat by Gary Wilson in the 2022 Scottish Open.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Jimmy Kimmel Live!
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Emmy-winning funnyman Jimmy Kimmel serves up comedy bits and welcomes guests that include other comics, celebrities, athletes and musicians, as well as everyday people with unusual or compelling personal stories. Kimmel's family and friends take part in the festivities, including his Cousin Sal, Uncle Frank (until his death in 2011) and childhood friend Cleto Escobedo III, who leads the show's house band. Recurring segments include the FCC-pleasing This Week in Unnecessary Censorship in which they take TV clips and "bleep and blur things whether they need it or not," as Kimmel describes it. But it's too bad they consistently run out of time for Matt Damon's segment.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Live: NHL Hockey
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: The Boston Bruins and the Detroit Red Wings are battling on the ice in a thrilling National Hockey League play . This crucial encounter takes place live at Little Caesars Arena. Boston currently holds a 2-1 lead in the season series.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Price of Fame: The Liam Payne Story -- A Special Edition of 20/20
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Exploring Liam Payne's meteoric rise to celebrity as a member of boy band One Direction and his personal journey, including his struggles with mental health and the pressures of stardom.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

HBO.East.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.East.us2.description: Set on a college campus centering on an author's complicated relationship with his daughter.

HBO.East.us2.title: Call Me by Your Name
HBO.East.us2.description: It's the summer of 1983, and precocious 17-year-old Elio Perlman is spending the days with his family at their 17th-century villa in Lombardy, Italy. He soon meets Oliver, a handsome doctoral student who's working as an intern for Elio's father. Amid the sun-drenched splendor of their surroundings, Elio and Oliver discover the heady beauty of awakening desire over the course of a summer that will alter their lives forever.

HBO.East.us2.title: Dead of Winter
HBO.East.us2.description: A grief-stricken widow stops by a remote cabin after getting lost on the back roads of Minnesota in the middle of winter. She soon finds herself in a desperate fight for survival as she encounters a murderous couple holding a young woman hostage.

HBO.East.us2.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
HBO.East.us2.description: Based on the beloved Roald Dahl tale, this comedic and fantastical film follows young Charlie Bucket (Freddie Highmore) and his Grandpa Joe (David Kelly) as they join a small group of contest winners who get to tour the magical and mysterious factory of eccentric candy maker Willy Wonka (Johnny Depp). Aided by his diminutive Oompa Loompa workers (Deep Roy), Wonka has a hidden motivation for the tour, one that he will reveal only after the children in the group show their true colors.

HBO.East.us2.title: Inception
HBO.East.us2.description: Dom Cobb (Leonardo DiCaprio) is a thief with the rare ability to enter people's dreams and steal their secrets from their subconscious. His skill has made him a hot commodity in the world of corporate espionage but has also cost him everything he loves. Cobb gets a chance at redemption when he is offered a seemingly impossible task: Plant an idea in someone's mind. If he succeeds, it will be the perfect crime, but a dangerous enemy anticipates Cobb's every move.

HBO.East.us2.title: DTF St. Louis
HBO.East.us2.subtitle: The Go Getter
HBO.East.us2.description: A love triangle between three adults experiencing middle-age malaise that leads to one of them ending up dead.

HBO.East.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.East.us2.description: Set on a college campus centering on an author's complicated relationship with his daughter.

HBO.East.us2.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
HBO.East.us2.description: After months have passed without a culprit in her daughter's murder case, Mildred Hayes makes a bold move, painting three signs leading into her town with a controversial message directed at William Willoughby, the town's revered chief of police. When his second-in-command, Officer Dixon -- an immature mother's boy with a penchant for violence -- gets involved, the battle is only exacerbated.

HBO.East.us2.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
HBO.East.us2.description: Comedian John Oliver hosts an in-depth, satirical look at developments from the past seven days in news, politics and current events.

HBO.East.us2.title: Neighbors
HBO.East.us2.subtitle: Halloween Competition
HBO.East.us2.description: An annual Halloween competition in New Jersey divides Otis and Nelson; in Simi Valley, Ruby and Linda's fence debacle escalates.

HBO.East.us2.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace
HBO.East.us2.description: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

HBO.East.us2.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
HBO.East.us2.description: Acerbic comic Bill Maher welcomes a panel of guests from diverse parts of the political spectrum for a lively discussion of current events, as well as offering his own perspective on contemporary issues.

HBO.East.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.East.us2.description: Set on a college campus centering on an author's complicated relationship with his daughter.

HBO.East.us2.title: Ex Machina
HBO.East.us2.description: Caleb Smith (Domhnall Gleeson) a programmer at a huge Internet company, wins a contest that enables him to spend a week at the private estate of Nathan Bateman (Oscar Isaac), his firm's brilliant CEO. When he arrives, Caleb learns that he has been chosen to be the human component in a Turing Test to determine the capabilities and consciousness of Ava (Alicia Vikander), a beautiful robot. However, it soon becomes evident that Ava is far more self-aware and deceptive than either man imagined.

HBO.East.us2.title: DTF St. Louis
HBO.East.us2.subtitle: The Go Getter
HBO.East.us2.description: A love triangle between three adults experiencing middle-age malaise that leads to one of them ending up dead.

HBO.East.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.East.us2.description: Set on a college campus centering on an author's complicated relationship with his daughter.

HBO.East.us2.title: John Wick
HBO.East.us2.description: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

HBO.East.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
HBO.East.us2.description: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. Ordered by Winston, kingpin of secret assassin society The Continental, to respect the organization's ancient code, Wick reluctantly accepts the assignment to travel to Rome to take out D'Antonio's sister, the ruthless capo atop the Italian Camorra crime syndicate.

HBO.East.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
HBO.East.us2.description: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

HBO.East.us2.title: Neighbors
HBO.East.us2.subtitle: Halloween Competition
HBO.East.us2.description: An annual Halloween competition in New Jersey divides Otis and Nelson; in Simi Valley, Ruby and Linda's fence debacle escalates.

HBO.East.us2.title: Born to Bowl
HBO.East.us2.description: At the U.S. Open, the first major tournament of the year in Indianapolis, Kyle Troup, AKA "The Pro with the 'Fro," sets out to repeat as bowling's "Green Jacket" winner.

HBO.East.us2.title: DTF St. Louis
HBO.East.us2.subtitle: The Go Getter
HBO.East.us2.description: A love triangle between three adults experiencing middle-age malaise that leads to one of them ending up dead.

HBO.East.us2.title: A Most Violent Year
HBO.East.us2.description: In 1981 New York, a fuel supplier (Oscar Isaac) tries to adhere to his own moral compass amid the rampant violence, corruption and decay that threaten his family and his business.

HBO.East.us2.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
HBO.East.us2.description: Comedian John Oliver hosts an in-depth, satirical look at developments from the past seven days in news, politics and current events.

HBO.East.us2.title: Wuthering Heights
HBO.East.us2.description: In this adaptation of the classic Emily Bronte novel set in 19th-century England, wealthy young Cathy Earnshaw (Merle Oberon) shares a loving bond with Heathcliff (Laurence Olivier), a poor childhood friend who now works in her stables. Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. Though Heathcliff returns with a self-made fortune, he realizes he may have lost Cathy in his absence.

HBO.East.us2.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
HBO.East.us2.description: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.East.us2.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
HBO.East.us2.description: Comedian John Oliver hosts an in-depth, satirical look at developments from the past seven days in news, politics and current events.

HBO.East.us2.title: DTF St. Louis
HBO.East.us2.subtitle: The Go Getter
HBO.East.us2.description: A love triangle between three adults experiencing middle-age malaise that leads to one of them ending up dead.

HBO.East.us2.title: Spider-Man
HBO.East.us2.description: "Spider-Man" centers on student Peter Parker (Tobey Maguire) who, after being bitten by a genetically-altered spider, gains superhuman strength and the spider-like ability to cling to any surface. He vows to use his abilities to fight crime, coming to understand the words of his beloved Uncle Ben: "With great power comes great responsibility.".

HBO.East.us2.title: Spider-Man 2
HBO.East.us2.description: When a failed nuclear fusion experiment results in an explosion that kills his wife, Dr. Otto Octavius is transformed into Dr. Octopus, a cyborg with deadly metal tentacles. Doc Ock blames Spider-Man for the accident and seeks revenge. Meanwhile, Spidey's alter ego, Peter Parker, faces fading powers and self-doubt. Complicating matters are his best friend's hatred for Spider-Man and his true love's sudden engagement to another man.

HBO.East.us2.title: Spider-Man 3
HBO.East.us2.description: Peter Parker and M.J. seem to finally be on the right track in their complicated relationship, but trouble looms for the superhero and his lover. Peter's Spider-Man suit turns black and takes control of him, not only giving Peter enhanced power but also bringing out the dark side of his personality. He must overcome the suit's influence as two supervillains, Sandman and Venom, rise up to destroy him and all those he holds dear.

HBO.East.us2.description: Comedian John Oliver hosts an in-depth, satirical look at developments from the past seven days in news, politics and current events.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: At the U.S. Open, the first major tournament of the year in Indianapolis, Kyle Troup, AKA "The Pro with the 'Fro," sets out to repeat as bowling's "Green Jacket" winner.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Murder in Glitterball City
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The body of James Carroll, a gifted hairdresser and drag performer, is discovered. Details are shared of Banis's and Mundt's relationship, revealing both men as complex suspects. Mundt's testimony against his former lover Banis is damning.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Murder in Glitterball City
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After Joey Banis is found guilty of the murder of James Carroll, the trial of Jeffrey Mundt begins. Joey Banis's video "confession" is scrutinized and allegedly staged by Mundt. The second trial concludes with a stunning outcome.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Thank You, Have a Nice Day
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A Mexican delivery worker in New York City tries to connect with his daughter while working, and one of the deliveries turns out to be a bitter surprise.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Margaret
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: New York high-school student Lisa Cohen (Anna Paquin) inadvertently causes an accident in which a bus driver (Mark Ruffalo) runs over a pedestrian (Allison Janney). Guilt-stricken over her role in the woman's death, Lisa's mood swings from normal to furious, with her angry outbursts mostly directed at her mother (J. Smith-Cameron). Lisa reaches out to the dead woman's best friend (Jeannie Berlin) and the bus driver, but her failed efforts to make amends only lead to more hostility.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: War for the Planet of the Apes
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Caesar (Andy Serkis) and his apes are forced into a deadly conflict with an army of humans led by a ruthless colonel (Woody Harrelson). After the apes suffer unimaginable losses, Caesar wrestles with his darker instincts and begins his own mythic quest to avenge his kind. As the journey finally brings them face to face, Caesar and the colonel are pitted against each other in an epic battle that will determine the fate of both of their species and the future of the planet.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Batman
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Inception
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Dom Cobb (Leonardo DiCaprio) is a thief with the rare ability to enter people's dreams and steal their secrets from their subconscious. His skill has made him a hot commodity in the world of corporate espionage but has also cost him everything he loves. Cobb gets a chance at redemption when he is offered a seemingly impossible task: Plant an idea in someone's mind. If he succeeds, it will be the perfect crime, but a dangerous enemy anticipates Cobb's every move.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: One Battle After Another
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Substance
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Fading actress Elisabeth Sparkle becomes distressed when her chauvinistic boss fires her from her aerobics show. She soon injects herself with a mysterious serum that promises a younger, better version of herself, but things go horribly wrong.

HBO.West.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.West.us2.description: Set on a college campus centering on an author's complicated relationship with his daughter.

HBO.West.us2.title: Little Miss Sunshine
HBO.West.us2.description: The Hoover family -- a man (Greg Kinnear), his wife (Toni Collette), an uncle (Steve Carell), a brother (Paul Dano) and a grandfather (Alan Arkin) -- puts the fun back in dysfunctional by piling into a VW bus and heading to California to support a daughter (Abigail Breslin) in her bid to win the Little Miss Sunshine Contest. The sanity of everyone involved is stretched to the limit as the group's quirks cause epic problems as they travel along their interstate route.

HBO.West.us2.title: DTF St. Louis
HBO.West.us2.subtitle: The Go Getter
HBO.West.us2.description: A love triangle between three adults experiencing middle-age malaise that leads to one of them ending up dead.

HBO.West.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.West.us2.description: Set on a college campus centering on an author's complicated relationship with his daughter.

HBO.West.us2.title: Call Me by Your Name
HBO.West.us2.description: It's the summer of 1983, and precocious 17-year-old Elio Perlman is spending the days with his family at their 17th-century villa in Lombardy, Italy. He soon meets Oliver, a handsome doctoral student who's working as an intern for Elio's father. Amid the sun-drenched splendor of their surroundings, Elio and Oliver discover the heady beauty of awakening desire over the course of a summer that will alter their lives forever.

HBO.West.us2.title: Dead of Winter
HBO.West.us2.description: A grief-stricken widow stops by a remote cabin after getting lost on the back roads of Minnesota in the middle of winter. She soon finds herself in a desperate fight for survival as she encounters a murderous couple holding a young woman hostage.

HBO.West.us2.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
HBO.West.us2.description: Based on the beloved Roald Dahl tale, this comedic and fantastical film follows young Charlie Bucket (Freddie Highmore) and his Grandpa Joe (David Kelly) as they join a small group of contest winners who get to tour the magical and mysterious factory of eccentric candy maker Willy Wonka (Johnny Depp). Aided by his diminutive Oompa Loompa workers (Deep Roy), Wonka has a hidden motivation for the tour, one that he will reveal only after the children in the group show their true colors.

HBO.West.us2.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
HBO.West.us2.description: After months have passed without a culprit in her daughter's murder case, Mildred Hayes makes a bold move, painting three signs leading into her town with a controversial message directed at William Willoughby, the town's revered chief of police. When his second-in-command, Officer Dixon -- an immature mother's boy with a penchant for violence -- gets involved, the battle is only exacerbated.

HBO.West.us2.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
HBO.West.us2.description: Comedian John Oliver hosts an in-depth, satirical look at developments from the past seven days in news, politics and current events.

HBO.West.us2.title: Neighbors
HBO.West.us2.subtitle: Halloween Competition
HBO.West.us2.description: An annual Halloween competition in New Jersey divides Otis and Nelson; in Simi Valley, Ruby and Linda's fence debacle escalates.

HBO.West.us2.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace
HBO.West.us2.description: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

HBO.West.us2.title: Ex Machina
HBO.West.us2.description: Caleb Smith (Domhnall Gleeson) a programmer at a huge Internet company, wins a contest that enables him to spend a week at the private estate of Nathan Bateman (Oscar Isaac), his firm's brilliant CEO. When he arrives, Caleb learns that he has been chosen to be the human component in a Turing Test to determine the capabilities and consciousness of Ava (Alicia Vikander), a beautiful robot. However, it soon becomes evident that Ava is far more self-aware and deceptive than either man imagined.

HBO.West.us2.title: John Wick
HBO.West.us2.description: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

HBO.West.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
HBO.West.us2.description: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. Ordered by Winston, kingpin of secret assassin society The Continental, to respect the organization's ancient code, Wick reluctantly accepts the assignment to travel to Rome to take out D'Antonio's sister, the ruthless capo atop the Italian Camorra crime syndicate.

HBO.West.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
HBO.West.us2.description: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

HBO.West.us2.title: A Most Violent Year
HBO.West.us2.description: In 1981 New York, a fuel supplier (Oscar Isaac) tries to adhere to his own moral compass amid the rampant violence, corruption and decay that threaten his family and his business.

HBO.West.us2.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
HBO.West.us2.description: Comedian John Oliver hosts an in-depth, satirical look at developments from the past seven days in news, politics and current events.

HBO.West.us2.title: Wuthering Heights
HBO.West.us2.description: In this adaptation of the classic Emily Bronte novel set in 19th-century England, wealthy young Cathy Earnshaw (Merle Oberon) shares a loving bond with Heathcliff (Laurence Olivier), a poor childhood friend who now works in her stables. Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. Though Heathcliff returns with a self-made fortune, he realizes he may have lost Cathy in his absence.

HBO.West.us2.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
HBO.West.us2.description: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.West.us2.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
HBO.West.us2.description: Comedian John Oliver hosts an in-depth, satirical look at developments from the past seven days in news, politics and current events.

HBO.West.us2.title: Spider-Man
HBO.West.us2.description: "Spider-Man" centers on student Peter Parker (Tobey Maguire) who, after being bitten by a genetically-altered spider, gains superhuman strength and the spider-like ability to cling to any surface. He vows to use his abilities to fight crime, coming to understand the words of his beloved Uncle Ben: "With great power comes great responsibility.".

HBO.West.us2.title: Spider-Man 2
HBO.West.us2.description: When a failed nuclear fusion experiment results in an explosion that kills his wife, Dr. Otto Octavius is transformed into Dr. Octopus, a cyborg with deadly metal tentacles. Doc Ock blames Spider-Man for the accident and seeks revenge. Meanwhile, Spidey's alter ego, Peter Parker, faces fading powers and self-doubt. Complicating matters are his best friend's hatred for Spider-Man and his true love's sudden engagement to another man.

HBO.West.us2.title: Spider-Man 3
HBO.West.us2.description: Peter Parker and M.J. seem to finally be on the right track in their complicated relationship, but trouble looms for the superhero and his lover. Peter's Spider-Man suit turns black and takes control of him, not only giving Peter enhanced power but also bringing out the dark side of his personality. He must overcome the suit's influence as two supervillains, Sandman and Venom, rise up to destroy him and all those he holds dear.

HBO.West.us2.description: Thirty years after starring in "The Wizard of Oz," beloved actress and singer Judy Garland arrives in London to perform sold-out shows at the Talk of the Town nightclub. While there, she reminisces with friends and fans and begins a whirlwind romance with musician Mickey Deans, her soon-to-be fifth husband.

HBO.West.us2.description: Fading actress Elisabeth Sparkle becomes distressed when her chauvinistic boss fires her from her aerobics show. She soon injects herself with a mysterious serum that promises a younger, better version of herself, but things go horribly wrong.

HBO.West.us2.title: Monster-in-Law
HBO.West.us2.description: Charlotte (Jennifer Lopez) is smitten when she meets Dr. Kevin Fields (Michael Vartan). So when Kevin pops the question after they start dating, Charlotte happily accepts. But she soon realizes that Kevin's mom, Viola (Jane Fonda), is not quite thrilled to have a new family member. Viola, a newscaster, has just lost her job and is feeling rather attached to Kevin, so she regards Charlotte as her new competition -- and will apparently do anything to make her son call off the wedding.

HBO.West.us2.title: Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them
HBO.West.us2.description: The year is 1926, and Newt Scamander (Eddie Redmayne) has just completed a global excursion to find and document an extraordinary array of magical creatures. Arriving in New York for a brief stopover, he might have come and gone without incident, were it not for a No-Maj (American for Muggle) named Jacob, a misplaced magical case, and the escape of some of Newt's fantastic beasts, which could spell trouble for both the wizarding and No-Maj worlds.

HBO.West.us2.description: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works as a cleaning lady in a hidden, high-security government laboratory in 1962 Baltimore. Her life changes forever when she discovers the lab's classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. As Elisa develops a unique bond with her new friend, she soon learns that its fate and very survival lies in the hands of a hostile government agent and a marine biologist.

They get more than romance when mistaken identity hurtles them into an incredible adventure involving corrupt cops, a mob boss and a crazy cab driver.

When V saves a young woman named Evey (Natalie Portman) from the secret police, he discovers an ally in his fight against England's oppressors.

HBO.West.us2.description: Erin (Drew Barrymore) and Garrett (Justin Long) are very much in love. When Erin moves to San Francisco to finish her journalism degree and Garrett stays behind in New York to work in the music industry, they gamely keep the romance alive with webcams and frequent-flyer miles. But just when it seems the lovers will soon be reunited, they each score a big break that could separate them for good.

HBO.West.us2.title: Marie Antoinette
HBO.West.us2.description: An Austrian teenager (Kirsten Dunst) marries the Dauphin (Jason Schwartzman) of France and becomes that country's queen following the death of King Louis XV (Judy Davis) in 1774. Years later, after a life of luxury and privilege, Marie Antoinette loses her head during the French Revolution.

HBO.West.us2.description: Reconstructing the nine harrowing days following the disaster in forensic, real-time detail, from the control-room engineers fighting to prevent a total meltdown, to the political leaders confronting the unthinkable, to ordinary citizens caught in the fallout. Power plant workers who were tasked with averting a major catastrophe by doing a potential suicide mission. These 50 workers recount the mounting pressures they faced as they entered the darkened reactors to try to avert the worst outcome.

HBO.West.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.West.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.West.us2.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
HBO.West.us2.description: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Lobster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: I Give It a Year
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: After a quick courtship, two lovers decide to tie the knot. As their first year of marriage unfolds, temptation and incompatibility put their relationship in jeopardy.

Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

When the proposed venue for the upcoming Woodstock concert falls through, Elliot steps in and plays a pivotal role in the generation-defining event by helping organizers secure Max Yasgur's nearby farm for the festival and offering the El Monaco as the home base.

When an innocent meal together turns into an affair, Jane finds that she is the other woman in the now-remarried Jake's life. Meanwhile, Adam (Steve Martin), an architect hired to remodel her kitchen, is still stinging from his own divorce. He finds himself falling in love with Jane but soon realizes that he has become part of a triangle.

Beaming Marge and her husband, Dick (Jeffrey Jones), up to Spengo from California, the daft, dimwitted leader tries to woo her, and sends her spouse to prison. Viola, a newscaster, has just lost her job and is feeling rather attached to Kevin, so she regards Charlotte as her new competition -- and will apparently do anything to make her son call off the wedding.

Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. However, the police soon break up the party and arrest them. The curvaceous quartet are unexpectedly bailed out by a drug dealer and aspiring rap artist named Alien (James Franco). Soon after, three of the four gal pals decide to join Alien in a life of crime.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Switch
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Neurotic Wally Mars has one bright spot in his life: his friendship with Kassie. When Kassie announces her intention to become pregnant using a sperm donor, Wally thinks he will be the lucky guy, but Kassie has someone else in mind. While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. Seven years later, Wally meets Kassie's son, who seems oddly familiar to him.

A time traveler risks his life to change the course of history and save the future of humanity.

Macy) is a car salesman in Minneapolis who has gotten himself into debt and is so desperate for money that he hires two thugs (Steve Buscemi), (Peter Stormare) to kidnap his own wife. HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Mariska Hargitay's journey to understand and embrace the public and private legacy of her mother, Hollywood icon Jayne Mansfield.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Reconstructing the nine harrowing days following the disaster in forensic, real-time detail, from the control-room engineers fighting to prevent a total meltdown, to the political leaders confronting the unthinkable, to ordinary citizens caught in the fallout. Power plant workers who were tasked with averting a major catastrophe by doing a potential suicide mission. These 50 workers recount the mounting pressures they faced as they entered the darkened reactors to try to avert the worst outcome.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Eddington
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

He vows to use his abilities to fight crime, coming to understand the words of his beloved Uncle Ben: "With great power comes great responsibility.".

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: When a failed nuclear fusion experiment results in an explosion that kills his wife, Dr. Otto Octavius is transformed into Dr. Octopus, a cyborg with deadly metal tentacles. Doc Ock blames Spider-Man for the accident and seeks revenge. Meanwhile, Spidey's alter ego, Peter Parker, faces fading powers and self-doubt. Complicating matters are his best friend's hatred for Spider-Man and his true love's sudden engagement to another man.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Spider-Man 3
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Peter Parker and M.J. seem to finally be on the right track in their complicated relationship, but trouble looms for the superhero and his lover. Peter's Spider-Man suit turns black and takes control of him, not only giving Peter enhanced power but also bringing out the dark side of his personality. He must overcome the suit's influence as two supervillains, Sandman and Venom, rise up to destroy him and all those he holds dear.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Whale
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A reclusive English teacher, living alone in the wake of a tragedy, attempts to reconnect with his teenage daughter for one last chance at redemption.

In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Billy Joel: And So It Goes

Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

Su habilidad lo ha vuelto muy popular en el mundo del espionaje corporativo, pero ha tenido un gran costo en la gente que ama. Cobb obtiene la oportunidad de redimirse cuando recibe una tarea imposible: plantar una idea en la mente de una persona. Si tiene éxito, será el crimen perfecto, pero un enemigo se anticipa a sus movimientos.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Gente de Zona: En letra de otro

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Neighbors
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Mac y Kelly acaban de tener una bebé adorable y se han comprado una preciosa casa en las afueras de la ciudad. Los problemas comienzan cuando descubren que sus nuevos vecinos son los miembros de una fraternidad cuyo presidente es Teddy Sanders.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 1 (1954-1957)
ACC.Network.us2.description: When Indiana native Everett Case arrives in Raleigh to become the coach at North Carolina State, his vision spearheads not just the rise of college basketball at his school and in the region, but the start of a conference that will change the sport.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 2 (1958-1968)
ACC.Network.us2.description: From Frank McGuire to Bones McKinney and Vic Bubas, new coaches emerge to challenge the early success of Everett Case. It all precedes a final poignant moment of triumph for Case at the only home the ACC Tournament has, until this point, ever known.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 3 (1966-1972)
ACC.Network.us2.description: After a rough start, North Carolina's Dean Smith comes to be known for both dominance and dignity, playing a central role in desegregating the ACC with the recruitment of Charlie Scott, who emerges as a star on some of Smith's greatest teams.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 4 (1973-1974)
ACC.Network.us2.description: An intense and high-impact rivalry develops between Maryland and North Carolina State, capped by the finale of the 1974 ACC Tournament in arguably the greatest college basketball game ever - and a battle that helps shape the future of the sport.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 5 (1975-1980)
ACC.Network.us2.description: Dean Smith's North Carolina teams may be the class of the ACC, but rivals also flourish, including a Virginia team led by Wally Walker, and a Duke program that re-emerges with a championship run in 1978 and a controversial title two years later.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 6 (1981-1983)
ACC.Network.us2.description: Virginia's Ralph Sampson earns national player of the year honors three times, but never wins the ACC Tournament. Dean Smith seeks a title with freshman Michael Jordan, and the charismatic Jim Valvano leads NC State on a memorable Cinderella run.

USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: Tomorrow

USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: Cursed

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Fugitive
AMC.HD.us2.description: Wrongfully accused of murdering his wife, Richard Kimble escapes from the law in an attempt to find her killer and clear his name. Pursuing him is a team of U.S. marshals led by Deputy Samuel Gerard, a determined detective who will not rest until Richard is captured. As Richard leads the team through a series of intricate chases, he discovers the secrets behind his wife's death and struggles to expose the killer before it is too late.

AMC.HD.us2.title: A Bronx Tale
AMC.HD.us2.description: As he grows into a teenager on the streets of the Bronx in the socially turbulent 1960s, Calogero gets taken under the wing of neighborhood mobster Sonny. Sonny initiates the boy into the ways of gangland life, in direct conflict with his straight-arrow bus driver father. But when Calogero falls for his African-American classmate, Jane, the repercussions threaten the entire neighborhood.

AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Pop Goes the Easel
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Stooges are down and out; with a cop chasing them, they flee into an artists' studio where they are mistaken for students.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Casino
AMC.HD.us2.description: In early-1970s Las Vegas, low-level mobster Sam "Ace" Rothstein (Robert De Niro) gets tapped by his bosses to head the Tangiers Casino. At first, he's a great success in the job, but over the years, problems with his loose-cannon enforcer Nicky Santoro (Joe Pesci), his ex-hustler wife Ginger (Sharon Stone), her con-artist ex Lester Diamond (James Woods) and a handful of corrupt politicians put Sam in ever-increasing danger. Martin Scorsese directs this adaptation of Nicholas Pileggi's book.

AMC.HD.us2.title: My Cousin Vinny
AMC.HD.us2.description: New York lawyer Vinny has never won a case. When his teenage cousin Bill and his friend Stan are accused of murder in a backwater Alabama town, it's up to the nervous Vinny to save him from jail, even though he's only ever tried personal injury cases before, and none of them successfully.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Goodfellas
AMC.HD.us2.description: Henry Hill, a poor Irish-Italian growing up in the 1950s New York City, rises through the ranks of his neighborhood's organized crime branch; he ends up in the FBI's witness protection program after testifying against his former partners.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
AMC.HD.us2.description: It's the height of the Cold War, and famous archaeologist Indiana Jones (Harrison Ford), returning from his latest adventure, finds out his job at Marshall College is in jeopardy. He meets Mutt (Shia La Beouf), a young man who wants Indy to help him find the legendary Crystal Skull of Akator, and the pair set out for Peru. However, deadly agent Irina Spalko (Cate Blanchett) is searching for the powerful artifact, too, because the Soviets believe it can help them conquer the world.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
AMC.HD.us2.description: An art collector appeals to Jones to embark on a search for the Holy Grail. He learns that another archaeologist has disappeared while searching for the precious goblet, and the missing man is his own father, Dr. Henry Jones. The artifact is much harder to find than they expected, and its powers are too much for those impure in heart.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Captain Phillips
AMC.HD.us2.description: In April 2009, the U.S. container ship Maersk Alabama sails toward its destination on a day that seems like any other. Suddenly, Somali pirates race toward the vessel, climb aboard and take everyone hostage. The captain of the ship, Richard Phillips, looks to protect his crew from the hostile invaders, and their leader, Muse. The pirates are after millions of dollars, and Phillips must use his wits to make sure everyone survives and returns home safely.

AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Uncivil Warriors
AMC.HD.us2.description: Set in the civil war, the Stooges are spies for the north; they impersonate southern officers and infiltrate the enemy ranks to get valuable information.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
AMC.HD.us2.description: It's the height of the Cold War, and famous archaeologist Indiana Jones (Harrison Ford), returning from his latest adventure, finds out his job at Marshall College is in jeopardy. He meets Mutt (Shia La Beouf), a young man who wants Indy to help him find the legendary Crystal Skull of Akator, and the pair set out for Peru. However, deadly agent Irina Spalko (Cate Blanchett) is searching for the powerful artifact, too, because the Soviets believe it can help them conquer the world.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
AMC.HD.us2.description: An art collector appeals to Jones to embark on a search for the Holy Grail. He learns that another archaeologist has disappeared while searching for the precious goblet, and the missing man is his own father, Dr. Henry Jones. The artifact is much harder to find than they expected, and its powers are too much for those impure in heart.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
AMC.HD.us2.description: The second of the Lucas/Spielberg Indiana Jones epics is set a year or so before the events in Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy needs to retrieve a precious gem and several kidnapped young boys on behalf of a remote East Indian village. This time he teams up with a night club singer and a 12-year old boy.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
AMC.HD.us2.description: Dr. Indiana Jones, a renowned archeologist and expert in the occult, is hired by the U.S. Government to find the ark of the covenant, which is believed to still hold the Ten Commandments. Unfortunately, Hitler's agents are also after the ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion escape from various close scrapes in a quest that takes them from Nepal to Cairo.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Live: TNA iMPACT!
AMC.HD.us2.description: Matches and storylines feature superstars battling for supremacy and championship gold within the ring.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Die Hard With a Vengeance
AMC.HD.us2.description: Detective John McClane (Bruce Willis) is now divorced, alcoholic and jobless after getting fired for his reckless behavior and bad attitude. He is called back into action, however, when a cryptic terrorist (Jeremy Irons) takes New York City hostage in a lethal game of "Simon Says" and refuses to speak with anyone but McClane. Teaming up with a street-savvy electrician named Zeus Carver (Samuel L. Jackson), McClane dashes through the city, trying to stay one step ahead of a murderous plot.

AMC.HD.us2.title: U.S. Marshals
AMC.HD.us2.description: An airplane bearing gruff U.S. Marshal Sam Gerard (Tommy Lee Jones) crashes in the wilderness. On board the same flight is Mark Sheridan (Wesley Snipes), a federal prisoner accused of double murder, who escapes during the ensuing chaos, but not before rescuing several people from the wreckage. Gerard is ordered to hunt down the fugitive along with State Department agent John Royce (Robert Downey Jr.), and the two pursue Sheridan relentlessly, despite growing doubts about his guilt.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Wee Wee Monsieur
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Stooges are artists living in Paris; when the landlord comes after the overdue rent, the boys skip out and wind up joining the French Foreign Legion.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Ants in the Pantry
AMC.HD.us2.description: The boys work as exterminators.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Joint Relief Revolution
AMC.HD.us2.description: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

AMC.HD.us2.title: POOF! Bye Bye Under Eye Bags!
AMC.HD.us2.description: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

AMC.HD.us2.title: Healthy Joints for Life With Rich Diana
AMC.HD.us2.description: Healthy Joints for Life! Episode 1 of world-renowned orthopedist and longevity researcher Dr. Rich Diana's new series on healthy aging; learn about the real causes behind joint aging, and the promising new drug, supplement and therapy options.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Aging Brain
AMC.HD.us2.description: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Silver Rarities Set
AMC.HD.us2.description: RCTV is offering a stunning complete Set of 43: 1986-2025 American Silver Eagles graded in Mint State 69; this set includes the first ever Star Privy mark issue, plus the Eagle Privy issue as a free bonus to create the ultimate ASE collection!

AMC.HD.us2.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
AMC.HD.us2.description: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: I'm a Monkey's Uncle
AMC.HD.us2.description: The caveman boys meet cavewomen.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Income-Tax Sappy
AMC.HD.us2.description: The boys are tax advisers.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Violent Is the Word for Curly
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Stooges are mistaken for as professors at Mildew College.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Die Hard With a Vengeance
AMC.HD.us2.description: Detective John McClane (Bruce Willis) is now divorced, alcoholic and jobless after getting fired for his reckless behavior and bad attitude. He is called back into action, however, when a cryptic terrorist (Jeremy Irons) takes New York City hostage in a lethal game of "Simon Says" and refuses to speak with anyone but McClane. Teaming up with a street-savvy electrician named Zeus Carver (Samuel L. Jackson), McClane dashes through the city, trying to stay one step ahead of a murderous plot.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
AMC.HD.us2.description: The second of the Lucas/Spielberg Indiana Jones epics is set a year or so before the events in Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy needs to retrieve a precious gem and several kidnapped young boys on behalf of a remote East Indian village. This time he teams up with a night club singer and a 12-year old boy.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
AMC.HD.us2.description: Dr. Indiana Jones, a renowned archeologist and expert in the occult, is hired by the U.S. Government to find the ark of the covenant, which is believed to still hold the Ten Commandments. Unfortunately, Hitler's agents are also after the ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion escape from various close scrapes in a quest that takes them from Nepal to Cairo.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Police Academy
AMC.HD.us2.description: When the mayor of a crime-ridden city loosens the restrictions on entering the police academy in order to get more cops on the street, all manner of oddball characters enlist to join the force. Among the cadets are suave Carey Mahoney (Steve Guttenberg), hulking Moses Hightower (Bubba Smith), beautiful Karen Thompson (Kim Cattrall) and sound effects-generating Larvell Jones (Michael Winslow), who all have to show initiative and courage when they are faced with tough situations out on patrol.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Trading Places
AMC.HD.us2.description: Upper-crust executive Louis Winthorpe III (Dan Aykroyd) and down-and-out hustler Billy Ray Valentine (Eddie Murphy) are the subjects of a bet by successful brokers Mortimer (Don Ameche) and Randolph Duke (Ralph Bellamy). An employee of the Dukes, Winthorpe is framed by the brothers for a crime he didn't commit, with the siblings then installing the street-smart Valentine in his position. When Winthorpe and Valentine uncover the scheme, they set out to turn the tables on the Dukes.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Coming to America
AMC.HD.us2.description: Prince Akeem (Eddie Murphy) is the prince of a wealthy African country and wants for nothing, except a wife who will love him in spite of his title. To escape an arranged marriage, Akeem flees to America accompanied by his persnickety sidekick, Semmi (Arsenio Hall), to find his queen. Disguised as a foreign student working in fast food, he romances Lisa (Shari Headley), but struggles with revealing his true identity to her and his marital intentions to his king father (James Earl Jones).

AMC.HD.us2.title: Weekend at Bernie's
AMC.HD.us2.description: Fun-loving salesmen Richard (Jonathan Silverman) and Larry (Andrew McCarthy) are invited by their boss, Bernie (Terry Kiser), to stay the weekend at his posh beach house. Little do they know that Bernie is the perpetrator of a fraud they've uncovered and is arranging to have them killed. When the plan backfires and Bernie is killed instead, the buddies decide not to let a little death spoil their vacation. They pretend Bernie is still alive, leading to hijinks and corpse desecration galore.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Police Academy
AMC.HD.us2.description: When the mayor of a crime-ridden city loosens the restrictions on entering the police academy in order to get more cops on the street, all manner of oddball characters enlist to join the force. Among the cadets are suave Carey Mahoney (Steve Guttenberg), hulking Moses Hightower (Bubba Smith), beautiful Karen Thompson (Kim Cattrall) and sound effects-generating Larvell Jones (Michael Winslow), who all have to show initiative and courage when they are faced with tough situations out on patrol.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment
AMC.HD.us2.description: After graduating in the first "Police Academy," Carey Mahoney (Steve Guttenberg) and the rest of his hapless fellow officers are assigned to a precinct commanded by Capt. Pete Lassard (Howard Hesseman), whose district is being harassed by a gang led by Zed (Bob Goldthwait). Given 30 days to shape up or lose his post, Lassard struggles to discipline his incompetent new charges, while subordinate Lt. Mauser (Art Metrano) plots to take his job away.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Coming to America
AMC.HD.us2.description: Prince Akeem (Eddie Murphy) is the prince of a wealthy African country and wants for nothing, except a wife who will love him in spite of his title. To escape an arranged marriage, Akeem flees to America accompanied by his persnickety sidekick, Semmi (Arsenio Hall), to find his queen. Disguised as a foreign student working in fast food, he romances Lisa (Shari Headley), but struggles with revealing his true identity to her and his marital intentions to his king father (James Earl Jones).

AMC.HD.us2.title: Trading Places
AMC.HD.us2.description: Upper-crust executive Louis Winthorpe III (Dan Aykroyd) and down-and-out hustler Billy Ray Valentine (Eddie Murphy) are the subjects of a bet by successful brokers Mortimer (Don Ameche) and Randolph Duke (Ralph Bellamy). An employee of the Dukes, Winthorpe is framed by the brothers for a crime he didn't commit, with the siblings then installing the street-smart Valentine in his position. When Winthorpe and Valentine uncover the scheme, they set out to turn the tables on the Dukes.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Hancock
AMC.HD.us2.description: A scruffy superhero named Hancock (Will Smith) protects the citizens of Los Angeles but leaves horrendous collateral damage in the wake of every well-intentioned feat. That's OK with Hancock; he doesn't care what people think and is just as likely to be found dozing on a park bench as saving a damsel in distress. However, after saving the life of a PR executive (Jason Bateman) and meeting the man's beautiful wife (Charlize Theron), he realizes that he may have a sensitive side after all.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Bad Boys
AMC.HD.us2.description: Miami-Dade detectives Mike Lowrey (Will Smith) and Marcus Burnett (Martin Lawrence) blow a fuse when $100 million worth of heroin they recently confiscated is heisted from station headquarters. Suspecting it was an inside job, Internal Affairs gives them five days to track down the drugs before they shut down the narcotics division. Action meets farce when Marcus is compelled to masquerade as his partner in order to gain the trust of a call girl (Tea Leoni), a key witness in their investigation.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Bad Boys II
AMC.HD.us2.description: The drug ecstasy is flowing into Miami, and the police want it stopped. Police Detective Marcus Burnett and his partner, Mike Lowrey, are just the men to do it. They track the drugs to a Cuban smuggler, Johnny Tapia, who is also involved in a bloody war with Russian and Haitian mobsters. If that isn't bad enough, there's tension between the two cops because Lowrey is romantically involved with Burnett's sister, Syd.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Independence Day
AMC.HD.us2.description: In the epic adventure film "Independence Day," strange phenomena surface around the globe. The skies ignite. Terror races through the world's major cities. As these extraordinary events unfold, it becomes increasingly clear that a force of incredible magnitude has arrived; its mission: total annihilation over the Fourth of July weekend. The last hope to stop the destruction is an unlikely group of people united by fate and unimaginable circumstances.

AMC.HD.us2.title: I, Robot
AMC.HD.us2.description: In 2035, highly intelligent robots fill public service positions throughout the world, operating under three rules to keep humans safe. Despite his dark history with robotics, Detective Del Spooner (Will Smith) investigates the alleged suicide of U.S. Robotics founder Alfred Lanning (James Cromwell) and believes that a human-like robot (Alan Tudyk) murdered him. With the help of a robot expert (Bridget Moynahan), Spooner discovers a conspiracy that may enslave the human race.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La nieta; Divorcio ventajoso
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Viviana y Mariano son una pareja de adultos mayores, pero él tiene una amante joven. Laura está inhabilitada y recibe compensación económica, su esposo quiere el divorcio y muchos beneficios.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amor y perdón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Natalia pierde a su bebé por la mala praxis médica de Daniel. El destino los une tiempo después, pero para que el amor surja entre ellos él debe ser perdonado por el error que cometió.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por una aventura, vaciaron mi casa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lilia está preocupada porque su mamá, tiene citas con desconocidos y el último hombre con el que estuvo le vació la casa. Ella alega que la vida se vive al límite y que no va a denunciarlo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Casa2; Engaño embarazoso
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: María no sabía que estaba divorciada, ahora espera un hijo sin derecho al patrimonio de su esposo. Una pareja contrata a una prostituta como vientre de alquiler, ella finge el embarazo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me gusta violada; En nombre de Satán
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Verónica quiere el divorcio de Andrés y que la indemnice, la drogó e hizo que la violaran. Carlos exige tratamiento psicológico para su esposa Magdalena, dice que hizo un pacto con el diablo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amigas del alma
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cuando Benjamín engaña a Amalia y queda embarazada, pierde el respaldo de sus padres. Entonces, su amiga Sandra se convierte en su único apoyo, demostrando el valor de la amistad.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una injusticia contra mi madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hilda es acusada injustamente del asesinato de su esposo, Ramiro, y la policía la atrapa. Su mayor dolor no es estar en la cárcel, sino que Mariano, su hijo, dude de ella.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Confianza
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tamara intenta seducir al profesor de Matemáticas y piensa que él está de acuerdo. Aníbal se convierte en su capricho, pero su actitud desencadena la desconfianza en el matrimonio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Camila le coquetea a Joselito
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Joselito le sigue el juego a Camila mientras los dos disfrutan de un trago. Ella cree que tiene todo bajo control y asume que él no la reconoce. Augusto se entera de quién mató a Eliseo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Nervios de acero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Miguel y Walfré tienen 22 años de amistad y su objetivo es ganar el viaje para celebrar en grande una despedida de soltero. Su desempeño en el juego sorprende y terminan listos para la fiesta.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Muere quemado; Baja costura
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El hijo de Laura muere quemado, ella pide 50 mil dólares a su vecina por daños y perjuicios. Un concierto de Bruno fue viral porque se vieron sus genitales, su representante no quiere pagarle.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Se aprovechó de mi enfermedad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Saraí denuncia maltratos por parte de su madre y asegura que les pidió dinero a los vecinos para pagar su funeral cuando ella estuvo hospitalizada, tras ser diagnosticada con cáncer.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vive obsesionado conmigo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Giovana asegura que Daniel, el primo de su esposo, miente al decir que ella le coquetea. Anallely, la esposa de Daniel, la culpa del fracaso matrimonial y afirma estar dispuesta a hacer lo que sea por él.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vagina encantada; Hall Pass
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Eva acusa a su novio Daniel de usar lubricante con éxtasis, ella da positivo en la prueba de drogas y la botan del trabajo. Carlos pide el divorcio porque Cindy le fue infiel con un famoso DJ.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mascota de moda
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cristal pide el divorcio a su esposo Marco tras cinco años de matrimonio. Él compró un cerdo para que ella cambiara sus hábitos alimenticios, pero ella quiere mantenerlo como su mascota.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Todo lo que pasa antes y después de los partidos de Liga MX, con lo mejor de Chivas, Tigres y Juárez. Análisis, datos y las voces de los protagonistas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi hermano perro
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cuando su hermanito muere, su padre le regala un perro para compensarlo emocionalmente, pero ahora el niño cree que el animal es su gemelo difunto y hasta lo llama por el mismo nombre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sexo por fuera; Acoso en el parque
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La hermana de Paola muere de una sobredosis, su pareja de entonces no lo evitó. Alfredo, fanático de los parques temáticos, le roza un seno a una chica sin querer, por eso le prohíben volver.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El hijo en mi vientre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mayra y Francisco sueñan con ser padres, pero caen en manos de un médico inescrupuloso que los estafa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vive obsesionado conmigo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Giovana asegura que Daniel, el primo de su esposo, miente al decir que ella le coquetea. Anallely, la esposa de Daniel, la culpa del fracaso matrimonial y afirma estar dispuesta a hacer lo que sea por él.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amor en pelota; Me pertenece
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El hijo de Daniel usa con su novia un juguete sexual en forma de pelota, la madre de ella lo demanda. Dariel y Karla no se ponen de acuerdo, él como donante de esperma quiere reconocer al niño.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Porque te amo, te doy; Made in China
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Karina se niega a devolver lo que recaudó para Jayzer cuando su pareja lo violentó, porque ellos volvieron. Julio contacta por redes a una china, pero resultó ser un hombre, exige que se aleje.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Bebé en venta
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Julissa es una adolescente embarazada que busca la forma de ocultar su situación. Una amiga la convence de vender a su bebé y así contactan a Sandra, quien está desesperada por ser madre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Necesito a mi madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Elisa está agobiada con la maternidad y descuida a su madre, que se pierde. Elisa se siente culpable de la situación y descubre cuánto necesita a su mamá.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mensajero de amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dany y sus amigos deciden montar un negocio de mensajería especializada. Uno de sus primeros trabajos es un anuncio para Ana, pero se confunden y Pepe le entrega el mensaje equivocado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: A nadie le importa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Amaranta sufre tras el suicidio de su papá y su novio la introduce en el alcohol y las drogas. Angélica, su mamá, decide llevarla a terapia, así descubre que estuvo a punto de arruinar su vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Caída final
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Las amigas Mariela y Fernanda quieren llevarse la sala de entretenimiento, pero sufren un aparatoso tropiezo. Las primas Berenice y Angélica buscan multiplicar sus premios por dos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La última boda
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Amparo se enamora de Miguel, pero su hijo le demuestra que él no es lo que ella pensaba y que podría estar involucrada en un crimen. Su pendiente se convierte en un símbolo de venganza.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá me quita los novios
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mayra acusa a su madre de querer quitarle a sus novios y asegura que la obligó a abortar. Su madre dice que le gustan los menores y que quiere disfrutar la vida porque todavía se siente joven.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Le pagué con la misma moneda
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ivonne, cansada de las infidelidades de su esposo, le hace lo mismo y se involucra con el mejor amigo de él. Leslie, su hija, se pone del lado de su padre y se distancia de ella, sin perdonarla.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tumba compartida; Hijos americanos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Varias familias compran un paquete funerario sin saber que tienen que compartir la misma tumba. Lucía demanda a Antonio para que le pague a las mujeres embarazadas que trajo a EE.UU.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El sobreviviente; Tatuando mulas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Roberto no ha logrado superar un trauma de la niñez y por eso afecta la tranquilidad de sus hijos al sobreprotegerlos. El amigo de una tatuadora profesional la mete en problemas con un cártel.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Circe y Joselito cara a cara
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Joselito conoce a la Mami Chula y descubre que se trata de Circe. Ambos se amenazan a muerte porque quieren dominar el negocio del narcotráfico. Las bailarinas del Babel corren peligro.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El niño o la casa; Guantes rosados
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Roxana exige que Jonathan, el hijo de su pareja, abandone la casa de la cual ella es copropietaria. Además, Julio es un exitoso boxeador, pero es homosexual y nadie lo sabía, reclama respeto.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Drag queen abusado; Gota a gota
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Iván es Drag Queen, contrata a Kevin para que le ayude a ser famosa, pero recibe una orden de deportación. Marta demanda a un prestamista, por las presiones de él, la hija de ella se suicidó.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La justicia en tus manos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alexa no puede soportar que Darío le pida matrimonio a Camila y lo acusa de violación para meterlo a la cárcel. Sin embargo, gracias a Luisa hay pruebas de su mentira.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Le pagué con la misma moneda
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ivonne, cansada de las infidelidades de su esposo, le hace lo mismo y se involucra con el mejor amigo de él. Leslie, su hija, se pone del lado de su padre y se distancia de ella, sin perdonarla.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Perseguido por el pasado; Persiguiendo la verdad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alfredo descubre que varios hombres lo vigilan y su esposa está detrás de todo. El padre de Lisbeth se quita la vida después de que Carlos, un cazador de pedófilos, lo pilla y graba un video.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La gorda fitness; No se hagan los suecos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Andrés no soporta el cambio de su mujer a una vida más saludable y le pide el divorcio. Rubén descubre que su pareja, Pavel, le es infiel y busca compensación por los daños que le ha causado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Donde Nace el Amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Roscio es una mujer ambiciosa que decide entregar a su sobrina María Eugenia por dinero. Finalmente, Maru consigue un hogar donde hay amor pero la inagotable codicia de su tía la persigue.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Caminar juntos por la vida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El día de su boda, Alicia es arrollada por un automóvil y queda inválida. Su novio, Ricardo, la abandona, pero Gustavo llega a su vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Malas decisiones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Nico ve cambiar su vida cuando debe admitir que nada justifica su delito, especialmente si causó tanto daño. Trata de resarcirse, aunque implique pagar por un crimen que no cometió solo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hermanos straight edge
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Carlos usa la violencia con los que no comparten su filosofía de vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 31 de la temporada 2025-2026 de la Premier League. Desde el estadio Vitality. Bournemouth se enfrenta a Manchester United.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi ligue se volvió mi hijo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lucía tiene un romance, sin compromisos, con un joven 27 años menor que ella, él se enamora. Todo se complica cuando su hija vuelve a casa, y ahora descubre los secretos de su madre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Discriminación a la vista; Solo cenizas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alejandro cree que maltrataron a su cuñado en el restaurante de Claudia, donde el chico trabaja, y la demanda. Sonia quiere que Juan José le devuelva su anillo, pero la prenda fue subastada.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Enterrado dos veces; Bebés tóxicos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Liliana culpa al esposo de Claudia de profanar el cadáver de su marido para falsificar su identidad, pide compensación. Roxana está embarazada y su novio cree que un hijo contamina el planeta.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La amante duerme en mi cama
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Román le exige a Sara que abandone su habitación porque Nadia, la empleada doméstica, espera un hijo de él. Tras 20 años de relación, la quiere sacar de la casa y que se separe de sus hijas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Isabel peligra en el Babel
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Joselito pierde la cabeza tras descubrir que las meseras escaparon. Decide mantener a Camila y a sus compañeras secuestradas hasta que aparezcan las muchachas. Trasladan a Gavino a su celda.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Bebé al horno; Amor equino
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Por celos, el hijo de la pareja de Claudia mete al nuevo bebé de la familia en el horno. Ricardo y Alejandro están casados, pero difieren sobre la yegua Jénica y se pelean su custodia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El irresponsable; Voyerista enamorado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luis le exige el divorcio a José porque se fue de viaje y le ocultó que su madre le pegó a los niños. Daniela exige que Esteban se someta a una terapia para eliminar su fetiche de voyerista.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de low riders
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: En este episodio especial, los concursantes tienen un sexi estilo lowrider. Son modernos, apasionados y no temen ir por lo que quieren.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Las tres gracias; El coro
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tres mujeres demandan a Jotsy por estafa, él se casó con ellas para luego abandonarlas. También, Ángela quiere que la reintegren en el coro, pero la directora no la acepta de regreso.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: El desconocido
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Adalberto, deportado de Estados Unidos, es testigo de un homicidio y termina casado con Carmen, la hija del difunto. Tres hombres se disputan a su mujer y él, en venganza, acaba con ellos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tres strippers y un chulo; Manutención de barriga
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Yudy es una bailarina erótica que está cansada de mantener a su esposo, quien trajo a su novia a vivir en la casa. Rafael quiere dejar a su amante por violar las reglas acordadas y embarazarse.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Rumbo al Mundial: Objetivo 2026
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sigue el camino hacia la Copa del Mundo con eliminatorias, selecciones, figuras y las historias que marcan la clasificación al Mundial 2026.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El precio de la fama; Doméstica explotada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Chary quiere ser el guardián de su hermano Jarxiel porque él está loco por ser famoso. Nakawe tiene una relación de amor-odio con su jefe, él le promete matrimonio para aprovecharse de ella.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La amante duerme en mi cama

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío al límite
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi hija, mi rival
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Guadalupe mete a su pareja en la cárcel por violar a su hija y embarazarla, pero esta alega que su mamá la maltrata y que ama a su padre, prefiere ser violada que vivir con su madre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: El gran perro muerto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Arrollan a un perro común y el incidente provoca un enorme lío en un pueblo porque nadie quiere levantar sus restos y se produce un caos. El asunto llega a la capital del estado como cuestión federal, y el ejercito interviene para que vuelva la paz.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tanga protesta; Los cuatro a la mitad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: David le exige a sus empleadas atender a los clientes en ropa interior, ellas lo acusan de acoso sexual. Dos dúos que formaron un cuarteto se enfrentan por dinero y por el nombre artístico.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LaLiga
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Real Madrid-Elche
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los mejores clubes del país protagonizan LaLiga, el campeonato de la regularidad del fútbol español. El torneo es una carrera de fondo en la que los equipos pelean por sus metas: la salvación, Europa, la Champions o el título. El Barcelona defiende corona.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Especiales LaLiga EA Sports fin de temporada
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: El sentido: Laliga Genuine
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: LaLiga EA Sports ha finalizado otro curso plagado de historias y de fútbol. El campeonato español de la regularidad deja relatos para el recuerdo y héroes que se han convertido en los protagonistas de la temporada.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Previo UEFA Champions League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Barcelona-Newcastle
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Espacio que se emite antes del comienzo de una nueva jornada de la Champions League. En él se repasa la actualidad de los equipos españoles que participan en la competición y se hacen previas de todos los partidos que se disputan durante la semana.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Champions League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Barcelona-Newcastle
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: La máxima competición del deporte europeo garantiza emoción y buen fútbol. 36 equipos se juegan el pase a la gloria durante una fase liga antes de llegar a las eliminatorias, en las que los partidos son a cara de perro. El PSG defiende título.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Champions League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Tottenham-Atlético de Madrid
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: La máxima competición del deporte europeo garantiza emoción y buen fútbol. 36 equipos se juegan el pase a la gloria durante una fase liga antes de llegar a las eliminatorias, en las que los partidos son a cara de perro. El PSG defiende título.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Post UEFA Champions League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Tottenham-Atlético de Madrid
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Tras la disputa de los encuentros, es tiempo para el análisis. Este espacio desmenuza los partidos con las mejores imágenes, intenta esclarecer las polémicas y da la palabra a los que han sido los protagonistas sobre el césped.
